sentences.target: Ich liebe dieses Detail am Kleid.

translations.de: Ich liebe dieses Detail am Kleid.
translations.en: I love this detail on the dress.
translations.es: Me encanta este detalle del vestido.
translations.fr: J'adore ce détail sur la robe.
translations.ko: 이 원피스의 이 디테일이 너무 마음에 들어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢这条连衣裙上的这个细节。
translations.yue: 我好鍾意呢件裙嘅呢個細節。
translations.ru: Мне нравится эта деталь на платье.
translations.he: אני אוהבת את הפרט הזה בשמלה.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích chi tiết này trên chiếc váy.
translations.nl: Ik hou van dit detail aan de jurk.
translations.uk: Мені подобається ця деталь на сукні.
translations.hu: Imádom ezt a részletet a ruhán.
translations.hi: मुझे इस ड्रेस की यह डिटेल बहुत पसंद है।
translations.el: Λατρεύω αυτή τη λεπτομέρεια στο φόρεμα.
translations.nb: Jeg elsker denne detaljen på kjolen.
translations.id: Aku sangat suka detail ini pada gaun itu.
translations.sv: Jag älskar den här detaljen på klänningen.
translations.ro: Ador acest detaliu de pe rochie.
translations.da: Jeg elsker denne detalje på kjolen.
translations.ja: このワンピースのこのディテールが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; syntactic subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; agrees with the subject 'Ich'.
Demonstrative determiner (accusative neuter singular) modifying 'Detail'.
Neuter noun; direct object of 'liebe' in the accusative.
Contracted preposition ('an' + 'dem'); introduces a dative PP modifying 'Kleid' and semantically relating to 'Detail'.
Noun governed by the preposition 'am' (dative); object of the preposition.

translations.vi: Bạn đã bỏ qua chi tiết đó.
translations.nl: Je hebt dat detail over het hoofd gezien.
translations.hi: तुमने यह बारीकी नज़रअंदाज़ कर दी।
translations.ro: Ai trecut cu vederea acest detaliu.
translations.ja: その細かい点を見落としてたよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite auxiliary (2nd person singular present) forming the present perfect with the participle 'übersehen'.
Definite article (accusative neuter singular) marking the object 'Detail' as specific.
Neuter noun; direct object within the verb complex.
Past participle of an inseparable prefix verb; main verb completing the perfect with 'hast'.

sentences.target: Im Vertrag fehlt ein wichtiges Detail.

translations.de: Im Vertrag fehlt ein wichtiges Detail.
translations.en: An important detail is missing in the contract.
translations.es: Falta un detalle importante en el contrato.
translations.fr: Il manque un détail important dans le contrat.
translations.it: Nel contratto manca un dettaglio importante.
translations.zh-Hans: 合同里缺少一个重要的细节。
translations.yue: 合約入面漏咗一個重要嘅細節。
translations.ru: В контракте не хватает важной детали.
translations.pt: Falta um detalhe importante no contrato.
translations.vi: Hợp đồng còn thiếu một chi tiết quan trọng.
translations.ar: هناك تفصيلة مهمة ناقصة في العقد.
translations.nl: Er ontbreekt een belangrijk detail in het contract.
translations.hu: A szerződésből hiányzik egy fontos részlet.
translations.hi: कॉन्ट्रैक्ट में एक महत्वपूर्ण बारीकी गायब है।
translations.el: Στο συμβόλαιο λείπει μια σημαντική λεπτομέρεια.
translations.nb: Det mangler en viktig detalj i kontrakten.
translations.id: Ada satu detail penting yang hilang dalam kontrak.
translations.sv: Det saknas en viktig detalj i kontraktet.
translations.ro: Lipsește un detaliu important din contract.
translations.da: Der mangler en vigtig detalje i kontrakten.
translations.ja: 契約書に大事な点が抜けています。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('in' + 'dem'); introduces a dative PP indicating location/context.
Noun as the object of the preposition 'Im' (dative).
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; indicates absence.
Indefinite article (nominative neuter singular) marking the subject noun.
Attributive adjective agreeing with 'Detail' in case/number/gender.
Neuter noun; grammatical subject with 'fehlt' (the thing that is missing).

translations.en: He pays attention to every detail.
translations.fr: Il fait attention à chaque détail.
translations.zh-Hans: 他对每个细节都很在意。
translations.yue: 佢對每個細節都好講究。
translations.pt: Ele presta atenção a cada detalhe.
translations.vi: Anh ấy chú ý đến từng chi tiết.
translations.uk: Він звертає увагу на кожну деталь.
translations.hi: वह हर छोटी-सी बारीकी पर ध्यान देता है।
translations.nb: Han legger merke til hver eneste detalj.
translations.sv: Han är noga med varje detalj.
translations.ro: El este atent la fiecare detaliu.
translations.da: Han lægger mærke til hver eneste detalje.
translations.ja: 彼は細部まで気を配る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present.
Preposition selected by 'achten'; governs accusative and introduces the prepositional object.
Quantifying determiner (accusative neuter singular) modifying 'Detail'.
Noun as complement of the preposition 'auf'; semantic object of 'achtet'.

Im Vertrag fehlt ein wichtiges Detail.

He pays attention to every detail.
